title: Rebalance CDC Childcare Slots
summary: CDC-1 Mainside has 187 families on waitlist while CDC-3 San Onofre operates at 82% capacity. Reallocate 15 slots from CDC-3 to create satellite waitlist relief and reduce average wait time by ~3 months.

steps.label: Review CDC-3 San Onofre staffing roster
Confirm 15 available slots at CDC-3
Notify top 15 waitlisted families from CDC-1
Update MyMCCS portal availability display
Schedule 30-day follow-up review

title: Add Weekend Staff at Paige Field House
summary: Paige Field House consistently hits 88–95% capacity Saturday mornings. Adding one additional staff member on Saturday 7am–1pm shift will reduce wait times and improve CSAT by an estimated 0.2 points.

steps.label: Review current Saturday shift schedule
Identify available part-time staff
Post and fill Saturday 7am–1pm position
Brief new staff member on facility procedures

title: 21 Area Pool CSAT Recovery Plan
summary: 21 Area Pool CSAT has declined to 3.7 (−4.2% trend). Primary complaints: inconsistent hours and aging facility. Quick wins: publish reliable hours, post maintenance schedule, coordinate a facility inspection.

steps.label: Audit and publish reliable operating hours
Schedule facility inspection with PWD
Post repair timeline on pool signage and app
Send CSAT survey follow-up to recent patrons

title: Iron Mike's Lunch Rush Campaign
summary: Revenue analysis shows Iron Mike's lunch hour (11am–1pm) averages only 42% seat utilization Tuesday–Thursday. Targeted push notification to on-base staff during morning formation windows could drive 15–20% lunch revenue increase.

steps.label: Design lunch specials menu for Tue–Thu
Create push notification copy and imagery
Schedule notifications for 10am–11am window
Run 4-week pilot, measure revenue vs baseline

title: WARR Program Capacity Expansion
summary: WARR has an 11-week booking backlog with only 1 certified trainer on staff. Adding a second WARR-certified trainer will double throughput and clear the backlog within 30 days, directly supporting readiness outcomes.

steps.label: Post WARR Trainer position (must have CSCS cert)
Review contractor vs. GS hire options
Schedule WARR certification training for candidate
Open additional WARR appointment slots in portal
